## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link the issue or ADR if there is one. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] docs
- [ ] chore / build / ci

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes (new logic has tests - see docs/TESTING.md)
- [ ] New pattern or decision recorded in docs/ADRs/ (if applicable)
- [ ] No secrets committed (see .cursor/skills/secret-leak-check)
